case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS FOX, STEWART et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FOX, STEWART MADDEN, ROSS MCLAURAN    ATTY. AT LAW $4,886.40 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,938.40 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-18-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-20-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT FOX, STEWART MADDEN, ROSS MCLAURAN    ATTY. AT LAW

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,886.40 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT FOX, STEWART MADDEN, ROSS MCLAURAN    ATTY. AT LAW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MADDEN, ROSS MCLAURAN    ATTY. AT LAW
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FOX, STEWART
